name: 001_default_print.sh
exercises: No expression defaults to printing matched paths
expected: Starting point and depth-1 children are printed

name: 002_maxdepth_zero.sh
expected: Only the starting point is processed

name: 003_mindepth_one.sh
expected: Children but not the starting point are processed

name: 004_depth_order.sh
expected: Child is printed before its containing directory

name: 005_name_matches_dotfile.sh
expected: Pattern *foo* matches .foobar

name: 006_iname_case_insensitive.sh
expected: Pattern f?? matches Foo

name: 007_path_absolute_pattern.sh
expected: Absolute pattern matches src/misc/file

name: 008_regextype_posix_regex.sh
expected: Extended regex matches foo123 only

name: 009_type_comma_list.sh
expected: Regular file, directory, and symlink are matched

name: 010_p_symlink_not_followed.sh
expected: Symlink itself matches -type l

name: 011_l_follows_symlink_dir.sh
expected: File inside the linked directory is visited

name: 012_h_follows_cmdline_symlink_dir.sh
expected: File inside command-line symlinked directory is visited

name: 013_lname_symlink_target.sh
expected: Symlink whose target ends in target is matched

name: 014_xtype_symlink_target_type.sh
expected: Symlink to a regular file matches -xtype f

name: 015_empty_files_and_dirs.sh
expected: Empty regular file and empty directory are matched

name: 016_size_bytes_exact.sh
expected: Only the 3-byte file matches -size 3c

name: 017_perm_exact_octal.sh
expected: Only the file with mode 0640 matches

name: 018_newer_reference.sh
expected: Only the file newer than ref is matched

name: 019_printf_format.sh
expected: Output is [abc:3] with no implicit newline

name: 020_print0_nul_terminator.sh
expected: Output bytes are pathname followed by NUL

name: 021_delete_file.sh
expected: Matched file no longer exists

name: 022_prune_skips_subtree.sh
expected: Only the file outside the pruned subtree is printed

name: 023_quit_stops_immediately.sh
expected: Only the first starting point is printed

name: 024_exec_action.sh
expected: Command creates marker content done

name: 025_files0_from_startpoints.sh
expected: The listed file and directory are processed as start points

name: 026_d_help_lists_debug_options.sh
expected: Help text mentions exec debug option

name: 027_olevel_preserves_results.sh
expected: Optimized search still prints b

name: 028_missing_startpoint_errors.sh
expected: Utility exits nonzero

name: 029_files0_from_with_path_errors.sh
exercises: Documented error: -files0-from plus command-line starting point
expected: Utility exits nonzero

name: 030_files0_from_empty_name_errors.sh
stderr: zero-length starting point from -files0-from did not fail
exercises: Documented error: zero-length start point in -files0-from file
expected: Utility exits nonzero
